title: Manufacturing Engineer - Havells India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Havells India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Havells India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Havells India:
Havells India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Havells India!
